title: notifications-in-app — kill switches
description: Two Pennant flags. Both default ON.

flags.description: Disables Reverb broadcasts on in-app deliveries. DB writes continue — users see notifications on next refresh. Used during Reverb incidents.

When many in-app notifications land for the same user in a short window (default > 5), collapse into a single `notifications.bulk` broadcast to reduce socket chatter. Individual db rows still written.
